output.summary: Applied all accessibility fixes to FullWidthMedia block and updated test page with comprehensive DemoContainer-wrapped instances. Added aria-label to play buttons, title attributes to all iframes, aria-hidden to decorative icons, alt='' to decorative images, and aria-labelledby to section elements. Test page now has 12 instances covering all attribute combinations and video sources.

filesModified.purpose: Added accessibility attributes to PHP template
changes: Added aria-label fallback to section element when no heading is present (aria-label='Full Width Media')
Added aria-label='Play video' to play button element
Added aria-hidden='true' to play icon SVG span wrapper
Added alt='' to poster image inside play button (decorative since button has aria-label)
Added title='Video player' to iframe element when no poster image is present

filesModified.purpose: Added accessibility attributes to TSX editor component
changes: Added aria-label='Play video' to play button element
Added aria-hidden='true' to IconPlay span wrapper
Added title attribute to YouTube/Vimeo iframes in playVideo() function
Removed unused imports: BlockControls, ToolbarButton, ToolbarGroup

filesModified.purpose: Added title attribute to dynamically-injected iframes in frontend JS
changes: Added title='Video player' to YouTube iframe template string
Added title='Video player' to Vimeo iframe template string

accessibilityFixes.issue: Play button has no accessible name
accessibilityFixes.fix: Added aria-label='Play video' to button element in PHP, TSX, and added aria-hidden='true' to decorative icon

accessibilityFixes.issue: YouTube/Vimeo iframes lack title attribute (WCAG 4.1.2 violation)
accessibilityFixes.fix: Added title='Video player' to all iframe elements: pre-rendered iframes in PHP, dynamically-injected iframes in JS (frontend), and dynamically-injected iframes in TSX (editor)

accessibilityFixes.issue: Section element has no accessible name or landmark identification
accessibilityFixes.fix: Added aria-label fallback when heading is not present. The aria-labelledby is automatically added by theme_block_props() when heading exists, pointing to the heading's auto-generated ID from theme_block_region_id()
accessibilityFixes.note: Theme automatically handles aria-labelledby via theme_block_props() helper when heading is present

accessibilityFixes.issue: Play icon SVG inside button is not hidden from assistive technology
accessibilityFixes.fix: Added aria-hidden='true' to span wrapping IconPlay SVG in both PHP and TSX

accessibilityFixes.issue: Poster image inside play button may announce redundant alt text
accessibilityFixes.fix: Added alt='' to poster image in PHP wp_get_attachment_image(). TSX ImageDropUploader handles this automatically.

warnings: Asset size limit warning (328 KiB editor.js)
Entrypoint size limit warnings (expected, not critical)

notes: Removed unused imports: BlockControls, ToolbarButton, ToolbarGroup
Linter auto-formatted iframe template strings for readability
Existing warnings in file are pre-existing (__experimental API usage, React hooks dependencies, BaseControl without id)

instances.title: Minimal - Image Only
instances.tests: Empty state handling for eyebrow, description, buttons

instances.title: Full Content - Image
instances.attributes: All fields (eyebrow, heading, description, buttons, image)

instances.title: Video File with Poster Image
instances.tests: File video source with play button interaction

instances.title: YouTube Video with Poster Image
instances.tests: Play button replaces poster with YouTube iframe

instances.title: YouTube Video without Poster Image
instances.tests: Immediate iframe render, title attribute present

instances.title: Without Buttons
instances.tests: shouldDisplay() handling for empty buttons array

instances.title: Long Content - Stress Test
instances.attributes: Excessive text length in all fields

instances.title: Heading Only - No Media
instances.tests: Media container properly hidden when no media set

notes: aria-label added to play button in both PHP and TSX
aria-hidden added to icon span in both PHP and TSX
title attribute added to iframes in PHP, TSX, and JS
alt='' added to poster image in PHP (TSX handles via ImageDropUploader)

fixesApplied.description: Added aria-label='Play video' to play button elements
Added title='Video player' to all iframe elements (YouTube and Vimeo)
Added aria-label fallback to section when no heading present
Added aria-hidden='true' to decorative play icon
Added alt='' to decorative poster image inside play button
Removed unused imports from TSX file

nextSteps: QA Agent should verify accessibility fixes on rendered frontend
QA Agent should test play button click interactions (YouTube, Vimeo, file video)
QA Agent should verify aria-label presence on play buttons
QA Agent should verify title attribute on iframes (both pre-rendered and dynamically-injected)
QA Agent should verify aria-labelledby on section when heading present
QA Agent should verify aria-label fallback on section when no heading
QA Agent should run automated accessibility tests if available
